features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: AI-powered compliance engine designed for Latin American beauty market
features.autoBlockDesc: Input ingredients, get instant risk reports: what violates, how to fix, which regulation — stop fines before they arrive
features.listingDesc: Not just translation — rewrite titles and bullet points based on Brazil/Mexico consumer search habits, with compliance built-in
features.highlightDesc: Direct ANVISA RDC numbers, COFEPRIS NOM standards referenced — have evidence for platform appeals
features.freeTryDesc: No credit card, no contract. Test first, upgrade to Pro only if you find it useful

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Every fine you avoid pays for a year of Pro
pricing.subtitleDesc: ANVISA single violation can fined R$ 10,000+, one Pro subscription covers the whole year

pro.name: Pro
pro.warning: ANVISA single violation fine ≈ R$ 10,000 (≈ $1,700), equals {months} months of Pro

1.a: Currently supports Brazil (ANVISA) and Mexico (COFEPRIS) compliance checks. Listing generation adapted for Amazon, Mercado Livre, Shopee and other platforms.

2.q: How accurate are the check results?
2.a: We train on official regulation documents and update the rule library regularly. For complex products, we offer manual review.

3.a: Free plan: 10 checks/month. Pro: $15/month unlimited. Detection API pay-per-use for batch scenarios.
